스팀페이지
← 스토리 목록으로

B796CFAA4C578089A46204A3A6B7D3C1, Restored Tale

Main Story

B796CFAA4C578089A46204A3A6B7D3C1”, “Restored Tale

퀘스트 배경

A18A98DC4FE7AF37512DAF860C7038E2”, “The ghost awaits the restored page in the depths of the mine.

진행 상황

FB81843A45D078969DE2F587C28CA990”, “Return to the 50th floor and use the page on the old man’s ghost.

완료

C7568C5D4B231522D272B89A24CFD57C”, “The ghost accepts the restored story and fades peacefully away.
